mapper.select:
SELECT count(1) FROM kb_category t WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{kbCategoryEntity.id},'%')
AND t.name like concat('%',#{kbCategoryEntity.name},'%')
AND t.sw_id = #{kbCategoryEntity.swId}
AND t.sort = #{kbCategoryEntity.sort}
AND t.status = #{kbCategoryEntity.status}
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{kbCategoryEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{kbCategoryEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{kbCategoryEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{kbCategoryEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{kbCategoryEntity.isDeleted},'%')
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM kb_category t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2 AND t.id = #{id}
select concat(ksw.name, "/", ct.name) source from kb_category ct join kb_subject_warehouse ksw on ct.sw_id = ksw.id where ct.id = #{id}

select ct.name, ct.id, sw.name as swName, sw.id as swId from kb_category ct join kb_basic basic on ct.id = basic.category_id join kb_subject_warehouse sw on sw.id = ct.sw_id where ct.is_deleted = 2 and basic.is_deleted = 2 group by ct.name, ct.id, sw.name, sw.id order by count(ct.name) desc limit #{topCount}
select ct.* from kb_category ct where ct.is_deleted = 2 and sw_id = #{swId} order by ct.sort desc limit 2
